title: Ned: Paid Acquisition & SEO
summary: Google Ads, SEO, and landing page work for a platform helping small business owners raise funding.
challenge: The platform needed to move beyond organic reach, improve paid campaign efficiency, and lower the cost of getting new users to understand and try the product.
work: Audited the website, SEO setup, and previous Google Ads campaigns
Researched keywords and grouped them around funding intent
Improved landing page foundations and campaign structure
Monitored performance and iterated ad copy, extensions, and negative keywords
results: More than 500 sign-ups in the first two months
